entry.title: Great Consensus Cleanup Revival
entry.summary: BIP 54, known as Consensus Cleanup, has been implemented in the Bitcoin Inquisition network and became active starting from block 291168. This significant update can be explored further through the provided [link](https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/bitcoin-inqusition-29-2/2236?u=antoinep). This change marks a pivotal moment in the network's ongoing development and optimization efforts, reflecting the continuous efforts to enhance and secure the blockchain infrastructure.
